Hero.label: STRATEGIC LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TA LUNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING THE WORLD
Hero.subtitle: Building on our reputation since 2008, Ta Lung Quang Minh proudly delivers safe, fast, and cost-optimized solutions for customs clearance, warehousing, and multimodal transportation.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: More than a decade building a seamless supply chain at Ta Lung International Border Gate

intro.title: COMPANY OVERVIEW
intro.content:
Founded in 2008 as Ta Lung Quang Minh Transport Trading Co., Ltd., Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company has quickly grown into a leading force in the border logistics sector. By capturing the Vietnam–China trade flow through Ta Lung International Border Gate, we have made major investments in a warehouse system and cargo consolidation sites that meet international standards.

Our service ecosystem covers the full spectrum: Warehousing, bus terminal services, customs brokerage, and international multimodal freight transportation.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to remove all customs clearance barriers and optimize supply chains through transparency and speed. Our strategic vision is to become the most important link on the Vietnam–China economic corridor.

timeline.stage1_text: Established Ta Lung Quang Minh Transport Trading Co., Ltd., laying the first foundations for border transport services.
timeline.stage2_text: Converted into Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company, expanded infrastructure to 25 hectares, and set a new clearance standard.
timeline.stage3_text: Fully integrating the Ta Lung - Chi Ma border gate system, building a chain of logistics services along the border route.

facilities.warehouseContent: Owning 3 strategic yards: Ta Lung Quang Minh, Vu Thanh, and Son Cang, with a total area of up to 25 hectares. The infrastructure is designed as a closed-loop system, fully meeting the strictest standards for storage and heavy cargo transloading.
facilities.transportContent: Operating a strong fleet with a wide range of load capacities, ready to meet every multimodal transport requirement of businesses with flexibility and absolute safety.

1.title: Receive & Assess
1.desc: Receive plans and documents, and advise on the optimal solution

2.title: Customs Declaration
2.desc: Handle legal procedures and ultra-fast customs clearance

3.title: Vehicle Coordination
3.desc: Route and dispatch vehicles into the dedicated transloading area

4.title: Safe Transloading
4.desc: Transload cargo with modern equipment and a professional team

5.title: Finalize & Handover
5.desc: Complete yard exit procedures and monitor the final leg of the journey

vision.title: FUTURE ORIENTATION
vision.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh is undergoing a strong transformation, focusing on digitalizing processes and comprehensively upgrading logistics warehouse infrastructure.

Our ambition does not stop at Ta Lung. Our long-term goal is to seamlessly connect business operations into the Ta Lung and Chi Ma border gate system, creating a closed border-service corridor running along the frontier. In doing so, we aim to affirm our position as a key gateway connecting trade between Vietnam and China.

offices.title: BRANCH NETWORK
offices.halong: No. 29 Le Duan, Bai Chay Ward, Ha Long City, Quang Ninh
offices.caobang: Ta Lung International Border Gate area, Phuc Hoa Commune, Cao Bang Province

FeaturedServices.description: Providing a closed-loop service chain, tailor-made to thoroughly solve businesses' operational and customs clearance challenges.

LatestNews.title: News & Events
LatestNews.seoTitle: Updates on Vietnam–China Border Trade Logistics
LatestNews.seoContent:
Welcome to the news section of <bold>Ta Lung Logistics</bold>. Here, we provide the latest information on internal news, import-export policies, new regulations at <bold>Ta Lung International Border Gate</bold>, and international transport trends.

Keeping up with changes in customs procedures and border clearance conditions is vital for businesses to avoid cargo delays. The expert team at Ta Lung Quang Minh continuously gathers and analyzes market information to deliver the most valuable insights to our customers.

ServicesPage.title: Logistics Service System
ServicesPage.description: Comprehensive supply chain solutions at Ta Lung International Border Gate, connecting trade between Vietnam and China.
ServicesPage.noServices: There are currently no services to display.
ServicesPage.seoTitle: Service capabilities at Ta Lung Logistics
ServicesPage.seoContent:
Ta Lung Logistics (Ta Lung Quang Minh) is proud to be a pioneer with more than 15 years of operational experience at <bold>Ta Lung International Border Gate</bold>. We not only provide individual services but also deliver end-to-end solutions from <bold>warehousing and bus terminal services</bold>, <bold>customs brokerage</bold> to <bold>multimodal transportation</bold>.

With a system of 3 transfer yards totaling 25 hectares, we are fully capable of receiving and handling oversized and overweight cargo, agricultural products requiring preservation, and large-volume consumer goods. Our team of specialists with deep knowledge of border trade policy will help businesses optimize costs and reduce clearance time as quickly as possible.

WhyChooseUs.title: A Guarantee for Success
WhyChooseUs.point1Text: Own 25 hectares of cargo yards with the most modern lifting and handling equipment right at the center of trade.
WhyChooseUs.point2Text: A team of experts with deep knowledge of border trade policies, handling every customs clearance situation flexibly 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.point3Text: Committed to minimizing storage time, with clear procedures and transparent, non-additional costs.

Partners.title: A trusted partner to hundreds of import-export businesses

ContactPage.title: Connect With Us
ContactPage.description: The Ta Lung Quang Minh team is always ready to listen and solve every supply chain challenge for you. Contact us today.

faq.q1: What is the average customs clearance time at the company?
faq.a1: With valid documents and prior preparation, customs procedures at Ta Lung Quang Minh's yard are completed in under 2 working hours on average.
faq.q2: Does the company support special cargo transloading?
faq.a2: Absolutely. With diverse equipment and 25 hectares of space, we can safely handle and transload all types of cargo, from agricultural products and minerals to oversized and overweight machinery.
faq.q3: Can I request waterway or rail transportation?
faq.a3: Yes. Ta Lung Quang Minh proudly provides multimodal transport solutions, flexibly combining road, waterway, and rail to optimize freight costs according to your needs.

ManifestoPage.value1Text: Every process from quotation to customs clearance is standardized. Customers know all costs and cargo routes clearly.
ManifestoPage.value2Text: Time is the customer's profit. We respond quickly to remove every bottleneck in operations.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.content:
Welcome to the official website of Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company.

By accessing and interacting with this website, you are deemed to understand and accept the following terms.

### 1. CUSTOMER OBLIGATIONS
- Ensure the truthfulness and accuracy of the information provided through quotation, application, or contact forms.
- Strictly prohibit any activities involving malware distribution, interference with, or unauthorized exploitation of our database systems.

### 2. COPYRIGHT & INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
- All text content, brand identity, images, and source code on this website are intellectual property managed by Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company.
- Copying, distributing, or using them for commercial purposes without written consent from the company violates the law.

### 3. DISCLAIMER
- Information displayed on the website is illustrative and intended to present our capabilities. Depending on the time and actual contract conditions, operational terms may change. We are not legally responsible for decisions made solely based on website content without direct consultation.

### 4. RIGHT TO UPDATE
The company reserves the right to modify, change, or remove these terms at any time without prior notice.

PrivacyPage.title: Data Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company values and is committed to protecting personal data and business information of our partners.

### 1. SCOPE OF COLLECTION
The system only records data voluntarily provided by users through forms (including full name, phone number, email, and request content) and anonymous access data (cookies) for statistical purposes.

### 2. PURPOSE OF USE
The collected data is used solely for the following purposes:
- Analyze requests and contact users for consultation and quotations.
- Support the resolution of issues related to operational processes.
- Improve the user interface experience on the website.

### 3. SECURITY COMMITMENT
We apply the most advanced data encryption standards. All customer information is stored within our internal system, and we commit to NOT selling, exchanging, or transferring it to any third party, except when requested by competent authorities under the law.

### 4. USER RIGHTS
You have the right to request extraction, correction, or deletion of your personal information from our system at any time via our official support email: **info@talunglogistics.com**.
